title: Permanent resident cards and status - Canada.ca
content:
## Permanent resident cards and status
Get a first card, renew or replace a card, travelling outside Canada, record your trips, understand PR status, renounce your status.
- Sign in to the permanent residence portal
- Check your application status
- Check processing times
- Become a Canadian citizen

## Services and information
How to get your first PR card or renew or replace your card

### Apply for a PR travel document
Who’s eligible for a PR travel document, how to apply for a PR travel document if you’re outside Canada without a PR card

### Get a photo for your application
Photo size, what can and can’t be worn, who can take the photo
Who is eligible for urgent processing, how to apply

### Travelling outside Canada as a permanent resident
When to use your PR card and what to do if you’re outside Canada without a valid PR card

## Manage your permanent residence status

### Understand your PR status
Permanent resident rights, losing or renouncing your permanent resident status

### Record your trips outside Canada
How to use a travel journal, what to record on your trips

### Voluntarily give up (renounce) your permanent resident status
Why, when and how to give up your permanent resident status

### Protect yourself from fraud
Avoid falling victim to fraud scams targeting newcomers
Learn about your first tax year, benefits and credits.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
